expected_properties: When FULL is asserted, asserting EN with RW=0 (write) does not alter internal memory or stack pointer.
FULL remains asserted after the illegal write attempt and no X propagation occurs on dataOut.
additional_cases.goal: Verify that a write operation is safely ignored when the buffer is full.
notes: Uses conservative observation after a single clock cycle; does not assume hidden latency.
preconditions: Buffer must be filled to capacity (FULL=1) before stimulus.
stimulus_intent: Drive EN high, RW low (write), and a non-zero dataIn while FULL is asserted.
timing_assumptions: Observe signals after one rising edge of Clk; no fixed-cycle completion assumed.

expected_properties: When EMPTY is asserted, asserting EN with RW=1 (read) does not change dataOut or internal state.
EMPTY remains asserted after the illegal read attempt.
additional_cases.goal: Confirm that a read operation is ignored when the buffer is empty.
notes: Ensures no unintended data appears on dataOut during underflow.
preconditions: Buffer must be empty (EMPTY=1) before stimulus.
stimulus_intent: Drive EN high, RW high (read), and any dataIn while EMPTY is asserted.
timing_assumptions: Observe after one clock edge; no latency assumptions.

expected_properties: After a reset, a sequence of legal push and pop operations behaves identically to the same sequence without a preceding reset.
additional_cases.goal: Detect regressions in functional behavior after a reset cycle.
notes: Re-executes basic write-read pattern following reset to ensure state re-initialization is correct.
preconditions: Reset has been applied and released, confirming stable post-reset state.
stimulus_intent: Perform a write (EN=1, RW=0, dataIn=0xA) followed by a read (EN=1, RW=1) after reset.
timing_assumptions: Conservative clocked observation after each operation; no fixed latency assumed.

expected_properties: Two sequences that are logical inverses (push A, push B, pop, pop) produce the same final EMPTY/FULL flags and dataOut values as the reverse sequence (push B, push A, pop, pop).
additional_cases.goal: Validate that LIFO ordering is preserved across different operation orderings.
notes: Uses metamorphic relation to avoid needing exact latency details.
stimulus_intent: Execute two push operations with distinct dataIn values, then two reads, and compare results to the same pushes in reversed order.
timing_assumptions: Observe after each clock edge; no exact-cycle timing required.

expected_properties: A write (EN=1, RW=0) when not full stores dataIn into the buffer and updates FULL/EMPTY flags appropriately.
A subsequent read (EN=1, RW=1) when not empty outputs the most recently written data on dataOut and updates flags.
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Demonstrate correct push and pop behavior under nominal conditions.
notes: Both write and read are exercised in a single test to keep stimulus compact while still covering two functional paths.
stimulus_intent: Perform a write of a non-zero pattern (e.g., 0x5) followed by a read to retrieve it.
timing_assumptions: Observe after each rising edge of Clk; do not assume hidden latency beyond external visibility.
